# CWE-262 — Not Using Password Aging (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-262-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

const maxPasswordAge = 90 * 24 * time.Hour

// Safe: rejects credentials older than the configured rotation window.
func PortalLogin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	user := r.FormValue("user")
	var hash string
	var changedAt time.Time
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT hash, changed_at FROM creds WHERE user = ?", user).Scan(&hash, &changedAt)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "auth", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	if time.Since(changedAt) > maxPasswordAge {
		http.Error(w, "password_expired", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
